---
title: "The basic Idea of Deep Learning"
id: materialspat-analysis-00
order: 141
summary: "A short introduction in Deep Learning."
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
activities:
  - activity-analysis-3
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - basic
  - YouTube
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/materialspat-analysis-00.md"
---

# The basic concept of Deep Learning

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3WcUTMWa9fU>

# A bit more basics

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RbcHiAYPbC0>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
